company_name: 中国石油天然气集团有限公司
notes: The candidate official recruitment domain returned HTTP 412 in the available public fetch environment on 2026-07-16. The corporate homepage was likewise unavailable with HTTP 412, so the recruitment-domain association could not be independently re-verified in this run. No login, CAPTCHA, headers, cookies or access control were bypassed; no job fields were inferred. A compliant browser or an official public endpoint remains required.

company_name: 中国石油化工集团有限公司
notes: The public recruitment portal was reachable and identified itself as 中国石化招聘网站. The publicly parsed HTML exposed only the dynamic application shell and no enumerable job rows, unique detail URLs, duties, requirements, locations, dates or salary fields. No hidden interface, login or access control was bypassed. A site-specific official public-data enumerator or compliant rendered browser audit remains required.

company_name: 中国海洋石油集团有限公司
notes: The repository seed identifies the Zhiye portal as the group recruitment ATS candidate, and the most recent automated public audit recorded HTTP 403. In the current manual run the corporate homepage exposed no parseable recruitment link and the ATS URL could not be independently rediscovered through public search, so official association and current openings remain unverified. No access control was bypassed and no third-party listing was substituted.

company_name: 国家能源投资集团有限责任公司
notes: The official group homepage directly linked its 人才招聘 entry to the recruitment portal. The public portal was reachable and displayed 招聘公告, 校园招聘, 春招统招 and 社会招聘 navigation, but the fetched landing state was a login page and exposed no enumerable role rows or unique public detail URLs. The previously counted login link was not treated as a job candidate. No registration, login or access control was bypassed, and absence of parsed roles is not proof of no openings.
